message: Operation 'createScheduledMaintenance' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are minimal and lack actionable detail. Enhanced summary with 'new' to clarify creation action. Expanded description to specify required inputs (task name, assets, frequency, instructions), explain the return value, clarify the side effect of automatic work order generation, and mention notification triggers. This helps AI agents understand the full impact of creating a scheduled maintenance task.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new scheduled maintenance task
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new scheduled maintenance task in the system. Requires input parameters including task name, assigned asset(s), maintenance frequency, and execution instructions. Returns the created scheduled maintenance object with a unique identifier and initial status. The operation establishes a preventive maintenance plan that will generate work orders according to the specified schedule. Side effects include updating asset maintenance history and triggering notifications to assigned technicians.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are minimal and lack actionable detail. Enhanced summary with 'new' to clarify creation action. Expanded description to specify required inputs (task name, assets, frequency, instructions), explain the return value, clarify the side effect of automatic work order generation, and mention notification triggers. This helps AI agents understand the full impact of creating a scheduled maintenance task.
